series_metadata.series_title: Common Carrier Report Schedule of Deliveries
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly report of movement of fuel in Ohio filed by common carriers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years after the expiration of the calendar year covered by the report. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after the expiration of the calendar year covered by the report., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
